arts.ttl: Savage scores 'perfectly-placed' long-range effort for Reading
arts.sum: Charlie Savage's scores from outside the area for Reading in their second-round FA Cup tie against Harborough Town.

arts.ttl: 'His Dad must have been jumping up and down' - How substitute Savage shined for Reading
arts.sum: Match of the Day Pundit Aaron McLean shows how Reading's Charlie Savage helped Reading beat Harborough Town in their FA Cup second-round tie.
